MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Eoizabeth A. MacDonald (415-922-5939) special appearing for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant.
Tentative Ruling is adopted - PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is denied and no sanctions are awarded.
